results.rendered_html: tejiṣṭha (superl. zu tigma und tīkṣṇa) adj. überaus scharf, — spitz; — leuchtend, — heiss; — kräftig, heftig: tvaṃ karañjamuta parṇayaṃ vadhīstejiṣṭhayātithigvasya vartanī  ṚV. 1,53,8 . tejiṣṭhābhiraraṇibhiḥ 127,4 . tejiṣṭhayā tapanī rakṣasastapa 2,23,14 . 6,12,3 . apaḥ 9,70,2 . bhānavaḥ 10,3,5 .  ŚAT. BR. 1,2,1,13 . tejiṣṭhaṃ tapati  PAÑCAV. BR. 23,16 .
